LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonSuccessDesc: {0} answers the sigil. A hostile breach signature has entered the map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoMap: This sigil can only be used while the pawn is standing on an active map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircle: Build an Abyssal Summoning Circle before using the sigil.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBusy: All abyssal circles on this map are already occupied by another ritual.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllUnpowered: All abyssal circles on this map are unpowered.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBlocked: All abyssal circles on this map are blocked or cluttered.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircleAvailable: No available abyssal circle was found.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_EncounterActive: An abyssal encounter is already active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NotPlaced: The abyssal circle must be placed on an active map.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_Busy: This abyssal circle is already running a ritual.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoPower: The abyssal circle has no power.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_InteractionBlocked: The activation side of the abyssal circle is blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_FocusBlocked: The ritual focus at the center of the circle is obstructed.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoHostileFaction: No hostile faction could be resolved for the ritual.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoBossArrival: No valid breach point was found near the map edge.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilActivationStarted: The abyssal circle begins to awaken.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilPlacementFailed: The sigil could not be stabilized on the ritual focus.
LanguageData.ABY_SecretBossRevealDesc: The beast died before completing its first phase. The kill did not end the protocol. A greater breach is forming.
LanguageData.ABY_FirstBossKillDesc: The first archon beast has been brought down. Herald fragments and a recovered override ampoule can now feed the first real post-boss reward tier.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldIntegrationUnlockedDesc: Herald Implant Integration has been completed automatically. The Abyssal Forge can now assemble the first boss-gated herald implants.
